author: lOrm
content: Fixed. transcript::append_entry now opens files via OpenOptionsExt::mode(0o600) and creates the project directory via DirBuilderExt::mode(0o700) on Unix. The file and directory are BORN with the restricted modes — no umask-default window between open(2) and chmod(2). Removed the post-create set_secure_perms calls (and the now-unused helper itself). Windows path unchanged (NTFS ACLs). Same shape as the #801 fix to OAuthStore.
